structured_payload_candidate.title: Non-Condensing Boiler Stage Up Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if any of the following is true: (1) Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage is unavailable (not subject to minimum stage runtime). (2) Efficiency Condition: Qrequired exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes. (3) Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Availability, efficiency, or failsafe condition met
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Stage up if any of the following is true:
1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage is unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime requirement. Or
2. Efficiency Condition: Qrequired  exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes; or
3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hybrid Plant Non-Condensing Boiler Stage Up Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Hybrid boiler plants (non-condensing boilers in next higher stage)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If any boiler enabled in the next higher stage is non-condensing, stage up if any of the following is true: (1) Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage is unavailable (not subject to minimum stage runtime). (2) Efficiency Condition: Qrequired exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes. (3) Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Availability, efficiency, or failsafe condition met
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
If any boiler enabled in the next higher stage is  non-condensing, stage up if any of the following is true:
1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage is unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime requirement. Or
2. Efficiency Condit ion: Qrequired  exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes; or
3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Secondary HW Pump Staging on Flow
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Variable speed secondary pumps serving a secondary loop with a flow meter
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Secondary HW pumps shall be staged as a function of SHWFR = FLOW S / SHWFdesign and number of pumps N-SHWP. (a) Start the next lag pump whenever SHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps) / (N - 0.03) for 10 minutes. (b) Shut off the last lag pump whenever SHWFR < (Number of Operating Pumps - 1) / (N - 0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Flow ratio conditions met for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up/down based on flow ratio thresholds.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Secondary HW pumps shall be staged as a function of SHWFR, the ratio of current hot water flow, FLOW S, to design flow, and the number of pumps, N -SHWP, that operate at design conditions. Pumps are assumed to be equally sized.
SHWFR =𝐹𝐿𝑂 𝑊𝑠
𝑆𝐻𝑊𝐹 𝑑𝑒𝑠𝑖𝑔𝑛
a. Start the next lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes:
SHWFR > 𝑁𝑢𝑚𝑏𝑒𝑟  𝑜𝑓 𝑂𝑝𝑒𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔  𝑃𝑢𝑚𝑝𝑠
𝑁−.03
b. Shut off the last lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minut es:
SHWFR < 𝑁𝑢𝑚𝑏𝑒𝑟  𝑜𝑓 𝑂𝑝𝑒𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔  𝑃𝑢𝑚𝑝𝑠 −1
